rationale: The skill provisions a Prisma Postgres database via the Management API (curl to api.prisma.io) and wires it into a local Node.js project. It reads/writes config files (.env, .gitignore, prisma/schema.prisma, prisma.config.ts, package.json), installs npm dependencies (hitting registry.npmjs.org via npm), and runs Prisma CLI commands (npx prisma init/migrate/generate/studio). It also creates and deletes a test-connection.ts verification script run via tsx, and references console.prisma.io for the dashboard URL.
